---
title: "Software"
description: "R packages and interactive Shiny applications for spatial statistics and global health."
toc: true
---

I develop open-source software that makes **model-based geostatistics** and
**spatial epidemiology** methods accessible to researchers, students, and
public-health practitioners. Everything below is free and open source.

# R packages

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### SDALGCP2

The successor to **SDALGCP**, now on **CRAN**. An R package fitting a spatially
discrete approximation to the log-Gaussian Cox process for **spatially
aggregated disease count data**, estimated by Monte Carlo Maximum Likelihood.

```r
install.packages("SDALGCP2")
```

[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=SDALGCP2){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/SDALGCP2){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### spLeakage

An R package to detect and quantify **spatial information leakage** in
predictive modelling.

```r
remotes::install_github("olatunjijohnson/spLeakage")
```

[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/spLeakage){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### ESPENAPI

An R package for downloading **Neglected Tropical Disease (NTD)** data directly
from the WHO ESPEN portal API and the WHO Global Health Observatory, returning
tidy data frames ready for analysis.

```r
remotes::install_github("olatunjijohnson/ESPENAPI")
```

[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/ESPENAPI){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### MBGapp

An R package and Shiny application for teaching **model-based geostatistics**,
walking learners through the full workflow: exploration → variogram → model
fitting → prediction. Published in *PLOS ONE* (2021). Now on **CRAN**.

```r
install.packages("MBGapp")
```

[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=MBGapp){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/MBGapp){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[Launch app](https://olatunjijohnson.shinyapps.io/mbgapp/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
[Paper](https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0262145){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### variogramApp

An R package and Shiny application for interactively exploring **variograms** and
**Gaussian random fields** — a hands-on teaching tool for understanding spatial
correlation across twelve covariance models.

```r
remotes::install_github("olatunjijohnson/variogramApp")
```

[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/variogramApp){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[Launch app](https://olatunjijohnson-variogramapp.hf.space){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

# Shiny applications

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### MBGapp

Interactive model-based geostatistics for population-health scientists, using a
**Loa loa** case study. Runs entirely in the browser — no R installation needed.

[Launch app](https://olatunjijohnson.shinyapps.io/mbgapp/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/MBGapp){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### variogramApp

Explore how covariance-model parameters shape the variogram and simulate
Gaussian random fields in one or two dimensions. Ideal for classroom use — share
the URL or a QR code.

[Launch app](https://olatunjijohnson-variogramapp.hf.space){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/variogramApp){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card .p-3 .mb-3}
### LEBLiverpool

A Shiny application visualising **Life Expectancy at Birth (LEB)** across Liverpool,
UK, illustrating small-area health inequalities.

[GitHub](https://github.com/olatunjijohnson/LEBLiverpool){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

---

All code is released under open-source licences. Contributions, bug reports, and
feature requests are welcome via the GitHub repositories above.
